output: Batch 2 executed for T4 and T6. Added `src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx` to resolve the stored default tool at runtime with `toolRuntimeManifest` + `isToolEligible`, render `ReighLoading` while preferences load, and fall back to `travel-between-images` without rewriting stale preferences. Updated `ToolsPane` to expose a home button on every tool card, highlight the current default, and stop propagation on `pointerdown`, `pointerup`, and `click` so setting the default does not trigger navigation. Verification passed with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check`, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts` (the existing `useUserUIState` test still emits its prior React `act(...)` warnings). Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/two-related-changes-to-the-20260408-0320/execution_batch_2.json`.
deviations: No dedicated existing test module covers `ToolsPane` or `DefaultToolRedirect`; verification for this batch relied on typecheck, targeted eslint, `routes.test.tsx`, and `useUserUIState.test.ts`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Created `src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx` with both `defaultTool` and `generationMethods` hooks, loading gating via `ReighLoading`, runtime validation against `toolRuntimeManifest` plus `isToolEligible`, and fallback-only behavior with no repair write. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check -- src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx`, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`.

Added the default-tool hook to `ToolsPaneComponent`, threaded `isDefault` and `onSetDefault` through every `ToolCard`, and rendered the home button with propagation guards on `onPointerDown`, `onPointerUp`, and `onClick` so default-setting does not trigger the card's `onPointerUp` navigation. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`, targeted eslint, `git diff --check -- src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx`, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/routes.test.tsx src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useUserUIState.test.ts`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx` uses both `useUserUIState('defaultTool', ...)` and `useUserUIState('generationMethods', ...)`, returns `ReighLoading` while either hook is loading, resolves the stored tool through `toolRuntimeManifest` and `isToolEligible`, falls back to `travel-between-images` on missing/ineligible tools, and never calls `update()`.

Confirmed the home button is rendered on every `ToolCard` in both Main and Assistant sections, stops propagation on `onPointerDown`, `onPointerUp`, and `onClick`, calls `onSetDefault()` from `onPointerUp`, uses the filled home icon for the default tool and a muted icon otherwise, and sets the required `aria-label`/`title` text.
